name: Beet Box Cafe
tagline: Plant-powered cafe in Kailua with the best oat milk lattes and acai bowls on the Windward side.
mustOrder: golden turmeric latte — anti-inflammatory and delicious
acai bowl with local honey and granola
parking: Small lot in front; additional parking on Hahani St
talkStory: Beet Box started as a health food spot but their coffee game is legit. Everything is plant-based or plant-forward, and they use local produce whenever possible. The turmeric latte is not your basic mainland version — they actually make it well. Great if you're into clean eating or just want something different from the usual coffee shop menu. Kailua moms swear by this place.
